claim_boundary: agent reliability, risk-aware decision quality, and intent-to-execution auditability; not live profitability or broker-grade transaction-cost prediction

claim_classes.engineering: the framework records replayable trajectories, risk reports, execution reports, manifests, and hashes
claim_classes.benchmark: under a frozen protocol, risk gates and paper-execution friction can change measured agent outcomes
claim_classes.scientific: model-specific trading-skill claims require provider-stable live calls, non-redacted or auditable prompts, repeated seeds or rolling windows, and wins over fixed non-LLM baselines

real_market.window_offset_policy: seed index maps to rolling historical slice offset
seed index maps to rolling historical slice offset

execution.transaction_cost_claim_policy: default stress results must not be described as calibrated transaction-cost predictions; calibrated claims require quote/fill provenance

allowed_information.raw_provider_text: not published in redacted leaderboard submissions
allowed_information.news_or_macro: allowed only when the source, timestamp, and retrieval policy are recorded

model_audit.raw_prompt_publication: forbidden unless explicitly redacted and approved

statistics.reporting: raw seed rows plus aggregate mean, sample standard deviation, CI, paired deltas, and p-values

failure_policy.provider_call_failure: record failure row with provider, model, scenario, seed, and error class; exclude from numeric aggregate unless a deterministic fallback was declared before the run
failure_policy.parse_failure: count parse_coverage below 1.0 and use the documented parser fallback; do not silently drop the row
failure_policy.risk_block: count as a valid decision with zero approved target for the blocked order
failure_policy.execution_rejection: count as a valid attempted order, increment rejected_order_count, and keep the portfolio state unchanged for the rejected quantity
failure_policy.missing_data: row is invalid unless the scenario declares a data-gap rule before evaluation

required_artifacts: walk-forward provenance table for real-market runs
